name: codex-claude-bridge
description: Wraps OpenAI Codex (GPT-5.4-class) inside Claude Code as an adversarial reviewer and execution rescue tool. Five slash commands (/codex:setup, /codex:review, /codex:adversarial-review, /codex:rescue, /codex:status) with a hard-coded 7-attack-surface taxonomy and structured-JSON output for closed-loop plan-mode integration.

commands.name: codex:setup
commands.description: Authenticate with your ChatGPT account via browser-based OAuth and cache the token locally.

commands.name: codex:review
commands.description: Neutral code review of the current diff using Codex. Auto-classifies large diffs and supports --background / --wait.

commands.name: codex:adversarial-review
commands.description: Hostile code review across 7 hard-coded attack surfaces. Returns structured JSON consumable by Claude plan mode.

commands.name: codex:rescue
commands.description: Hand a Claude-authored plan to Codex for execution. Mutates the working tree under user-confirmed permissions.

commands.name: codex:status
commands.description: Inspect the current background Codex job (state, elapsed time, queued requests).
